title: Cleanup Timer Quest
description: A friendly cleanup quest that makes a messy zone feel finishable by sorting toys, clothes, and books before sending each pile home.
learningGoals: Sort a mixed mess into toys, clothes, and books
Store one category at a time after sorting
Develop a gentle sense of elapsed time
Experience cleanup as a short, finishable routine
interactionModel: tap the large done row after each real-world cleanup step; friendly timers coach sorting and storing without threatening or rushing
feedbackModel: gentle game-show voice with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; timer completion is always encouraging and the clean room is the prize

modes.title: Room Rescue
modes.skill: sort first, then store one category at a time

modes.title: Five-Minute Wonder
modes.skill: time awareness during one bounded cleanup
